notableEvents.label: Jake Cronenworth reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Cronenworth reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Josh Naylor, assist to pitcher Luis Castillo. Miguel Andujar to 3rd. Luis Campusano to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts grounds into a double play, third baseman Brendan Donovan to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Manny Machado out at 2nd. Xander Bogaerts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Walker Buehler picks off Brendan Donovan at 1st on throw to first baseman Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Cronenworth reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Josh Naylor, assist to pitcher Luis Castillo. Miguel Andujar to 3rd. Luis Campusano to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Padres challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Julio Rodríguez hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Connor Joe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe lines out sharply to left fielder Ramón Laureano.

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver called out on strikes.
